message:
ci: split monolithic 'checks' job into fmt/lint/test/conformance/gates (br-frankenpandas-ffhs)

The old ci.yml ran everything in one serial `checks` job: fmt →
check → clippy → rustdoc → workspace test → fixture freshness →
conformance test → perf → phase2c gate → CI gate topology →
governance gate. ~15 steps, ~5-8 min wall-clock, one red badge
regardless of which step failed, retry-cost identical per step.

Refactored into 5 parallel jobs with needs: dependencies:

  fmt         — `cargo fmt --check`. No deps. ~30s runtime.
                Rust toolchain with rustfmt only.

  lint        — `cargo check` + `cargo clippy -D warnings` +
                `cargo doc -D warnings` (RUSTDOCFLAGS). No deps
                on test. Runs in parallel with test.
                Rust toolchain with clippy + rust-src.

  test        — `cargo test --workspace`. Needs pandas (live
                oracle tests inside workspace require pandas
                subprocess). Python 3.11 + pip install
                oracle/requirements.txt.

  conformance — `cargo test -p fp-conformance --nocapture` +
                `scripts/check_fixture_freshness.sh` +
                `cargo test --test perf_baselines` (br-ing6 gate).
                needs: [test] (no reason to run conformance if
                basic tests fail).

  gates       — `scripts/phase2c_gate_check.sh` +
                `fp-ci-gates` binary (G1..G8 + forensics) +
                `scripts/governance_gate_check.sh` + artifact
                uploads. needs: [conformance].

Preserved as-is (unchanged from prior ci.yml):
  security        (cargo-audit + cargo-machete — br-36qc + br-npki)
  licenses        (cargo-deny — br-36qc)
  secret-scan     (gitleaks — br-hg60)
  fuzz-regression (fuzz corpus — br-zjme)

Workflow-level concurrency group (br-0iyb) applies to every job.

Impact:
- Wall-clock per PR drops from serial ~7 min to ~4 min
  (bound by longest parallel job, typically `test`).
- Per-job status visible in PR UI: reviewers see 5 named badges
  instead of one red "checks" blob.
- Retry cost: `fmt`-only fix re-runs fmt only (~30s) instead of
  the full 7-min chain.
- Cache isolation: each job has its own CARGO_TARGET_DIR
  (.target-lint, .target, .target-conformance, .target-gates)
  so lint cache doesn't thrash against test cache.
- Future-proof: br-0l5r (cross-platform matrix) and br-kmbc
  (feature matrix) now expand `test` or `lint` cleanly without
  bloating a mega-job.

Tradeoff: each job repeats the "Resolve pinned Rust toolchain"
step (~3 seconds) + `dtolnay/rust-toolchain@master` setup
(~5-10 seconds). At 5 jobs, that's ~70 seconds of redundant
setup time. Significantly less than the ~3 min saved on
wall-clock.

YAML validated via python yaml.safe_load.

Related:
- br-0iyb (concurrency group, shipped) — cancels stale runs.
- br-0a83 (llvm-cov cleanup, shipped) — removed dead install
  from the old monolith; no equivalent in the split.
- br-0l5r (cross-platform matrix, open) — natural fit for
  `test` + `lint` matrix strategy: [ubuntu, macos, windows].
- br-kmbc (feature matrix, open) — natural fit for `test` or
  `lint` matrix: [--no-default-features, --all-features,
  default].

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -10,7 +10,72 @@ concurrency:
   cancel-in-progress: ${{ github.event_name == 'pull_request' }}
 
 jobs:
-  checks:
+  fmt:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    env:
+      CARGO_TERM_COLOR: always
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout
+        uses: actions/checkout@v6
+
+      - name: Resolve pinned Rust toolchain
+        id: rust_toolchain
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          python3 - <<'PY' >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+          import tomllib
+
+          with open("rust-toolchain.toml", "rb") as fh:
+              print(f"channel={tomllib.load(fh)['toolchain']['channel']}")
+          PY
+
+      - name: Setup Rust (pinned nightly + rustfmt)
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@master
+        with:
+          toolchain: ${{ steps.rust_toolchain.outputs.channel }}
+          components: rustfmt
+
+      - name: Format check
+        run: cargo fmt --check
+
+  lint:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    env:
+      CARGO_TERM_COLOR: always
+      CARGO_TARGET_DIR: ${{ github.workspace }}/.target-lint
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout
+        uses: actions/checkout@v6
+
+      - name: Resolve pinned Rust toolchain
+        id: rust_toolchain
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          python3 - <<'PY' >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+          import tomllib
+
+          with open("rust-toolchain.toml", "rb") as fh:
+              print(f"channel={tomllib.load(fh)['toolchain']['channel']}")
+          PY
+
+      - name: Setup Rust (pinned nightly + clippy/rust-src)
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@master
+        with:
+          toolchain: ${{ steps.rust_toolchain.outputs.channel }}
+          components: clippy, rust-src
+
+      - name: Check
+        run: cargo check --all-targets
+
+      - name: Clippy
+        run: cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings
+
+      - name: Rustdoc
+        env:
+          RUSTDOCFLAGS: -D warnings
+        run: cargo doc --workspace --no-deps --all-features
+
+  test:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     env:
       CARGO_TERM_COLOR: always
@@ -33,11 +98,10 @@ jobs:
               print(f"channel={tomllib.load(fh)['toolchain']['channel']}")
           PY
 
-      - name: Setup Rust (pinned nightly + fmt/clippy/rust-src)
+      - name: Setup Rust (pinned nightly)
         uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@master
         with:
           toolchain: ${{ steps.rust_toolchain.outputs.channel }}
-          components: rustfmt, clippy, rust-src
 
       - name: Setup Python
         uses: actions/setup-python@v6
@@ -50,22 +114,48 @@ jobs:
       - name: Install pinned pandas oracle dependency
         run: python -m pip install --upgrade pip -r crates/fp-conformance/oracle/requirements.txt
 
-      - name: Format
-        run: cargo fmt --check
+      - name: Workspace tests
+        run: cargo test --workspace
 
-      - name: Check
-        run: cargo check --all-targets
+  conformance:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    needs: [test]
+    env:
+      CARGO_TERM_COLOR: always
+      CARGO_TARGET_DIR: ${{ github.workspace }}/.target-conformance
+      TMPDIR: ${{ github.workspace }}/.tmp
+      FP_PYTHON_BIN: python
+      FP_REQUIRE_LIVE_ORACLE: "1"
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout
+        uses: actions/checkout@v6
 
-      - name: Clippy
-        run: cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings
+      - name: Resolve pinned Rust toolchain
+        id: rust_toolchain
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          python3 - <<'PY' >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+          import tomllib
 
-      - name: Rustdoc
-        env:
-          RUSTDOCFLAGS: -D warnings
-        run: cargo doc --workspace --no-deps --all-features
+          with open("rust-toolchain.toml", "rb") as fh:
+              print(f"channel={tomllib.load(fh)['toolchain']['channel']}")
+          PY
 
-      - name: Workspace tests
-        run: cargo test --workspace
+      - name: Setup Rust (pinned nightly)
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@master
+        with:
+          toolchain: ${{ steps.rust_toolchain.outputs.channel }}
+
+      - name: Setup Python
+        uses: actions/setup-python@v6
+        with:
+          python-version: "3.11"
+
+      - name: Create temp dirs
+        run: mkdir -p .tmp .target-conformance
+
+      - name: Install pinned pandas oracle dependency
+        run: python -m pip install --upgrade pip -r crates/fp-conformance/oracle/requirements.txt
 
       - name: Fixture freshness
         run: ./scripts/check_fixture_freshness.sh
@@ -76,6 +166,46 @@ jobs:
       - name: Performance regression gate
         run: cargo test -p fp-conformance --test perf_baselines -- --nocapture --ignored --skip perf_run_all_baselines
 
+  gates:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    needs: [conformance]
+    env:
+      CARGO_TERM_COLOR: always
+      CARGO_TARGET_DIR: ${{ github.workspace }}/.target-gates
+      TMPDIR: ${{ github.workspace }}/.tmp
+      FP_PYTHON_BIN: python
+      FP_REQUIRE_LIVE_ORACLE: "1"
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout
+        uses: actions/checkout@v6
+
+      - name: Resolve pinned Rust toolchain
+        id: rust_toolchain
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          python3 - <<'PY' >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+          import tomllib
+
+          with open("rust-toolchain.toml", "rb") as fh:
+              print(f"channel={tomllib.load(fh)['toolchain']['channel']}")
+          PY
+
+      - name: Setup Rust (pinned nightly)
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@master
+        with:
+          toolchain: ${{ steps.rust_toolchain.outputs.channel }}
+
+      - name: Setup Python
+        uses: actions/setup-python@v6
+        with:
+          python-version: "3.11"
+
+      - name: Create temp dirs
+        run: mkdir -p .tmp .target-gates
+
+      - name: Install pinned pandas oracle dependency
+        run: python -m pip install --upgrade pip -r crates/fp-conformance/oracle/requirements.txt
+
       - name: Phase2C gate check
         run: ./scripts/phase2c_gate_check.sh
